diagram_title: Stabilize Prompt Cache And Harden Compaction

activities.title: Assemble Prompt
activities.description: PromptAssembler turn-level orchestration; produces static system message, context preface message, and triggers plugin hooks (C1, DD-12).

activities.title: Place Cache Breakpoints
activities.description: Map BP1..BP4 onto outbound messages per DD-3 allocation (C4).

activities.title: Protect Compaction Anchor
activities.description: Apply sanitizer, idle gate, skill binding, cache-miss diagnosis around anchor write (C5, C6, C8, C9).

activities.title: Guard Capability Rebind
activities.description: Distinguish cross-account vs same-account fallback in CapabilityLayer.get (C7, DD-8).

activities.title: Emit Telemetry
activities.description: Publish prompt.cache.* and compaction.* events per DD-13 (C11).

arrows.label: Anthropic 4-breakpoint budget; per-provider cache control variant
request to LLM provider with cache_control marks
request for current capability layer (per turn)
sanitized anchor message appended to message-stream
BP placement record + provider response cache headers

activities.title: Build Static System Block
activities.description: Concatenate L1 Driver + L2 Agent + L3c AGENTS + L5 user-system + L6 BOUNDARY + L7 SYSTEM.md + L8 Identity in DD-12 fixed order; emit byte-deterministic text + sha256 hash (C2).

activities.title: Build Context Preface
activities.description: Pull T1 (README, cwd, pinned skills, today's date) and T2 (active skills, summary skills) ranked slow-first; emit user-role message with kind=context-preface and tier-marked content blocks (C3, DD-1/2/4/5).

activities.title: Fan Out Plugin Hooks
activities.description: Fire experimental.chat.system.transform with static block; fire experimental.chat.context.transform with ContextPrefaceParts (C10, DD-11).

arrows.label: static tuple (model, agent, account, AGENTS.md, SYSTEM.md, user-system, role)
preload parts + skill registry snapshot + date
DD-1 envelope rule, DD-2 date-last rule, DD-4 single-message-multi-block rule

activities.title: Sanitize Anchor Body
activities.description: Wrap body in <prior_context source="{kind}">; rewrite imperative-leading lines with 'Note from prior context: ' prefix (C5, DD-6).

activities.title: Gate Idle Compaction
activities.description: Scan last 2 messages for unmatched tool_use; defer with telemetry when unclean; pass through when clean (C6, DD-7).

activities.title: Bind Skill To Anchor
activities.description: Scan compacted span for skill name references; pin matched active/summary skills; embed skillSnapshot into anchor metadata (C8, DD-9).

activities.title: Diagnose Cache Miss
activities.description: Compare last 3 staticSystemBlock hashes; classify churn vs conversation-growth; gate cache-aware compaction (C9, DD-10).

arrows.label: sanitized anchor body for message-stream append

validation_notes: plan-builder convention requires singular idef0.json; this file embeds A0 root + A1/A3 decompositions inline via the 'decompositions' map (per-level file split per miatdiagram §8.1 not adopted to match plan-validate.ts expectations).
Every activity has at least one input and one output arrow per IDEF0 §5 ICOM rules.
ModuleRefs in grafcet.json reference these activity IDs (A1, A11, A12, A13, A2, A3, A31, A32, A33, A34, A4, A5).
